prompt: A simple cute flat vector illustration of a cheerful Japanese schoolgirl centered on a plain light gray background, shown from about mid-thigh up in a front-facing pose. She has long straight black hair with side-swept bangs, fair skin, a rounded face, pink blush on both cheeks, one eye open and the other eye winking, a small nose, and an open smiling mouth. She is wearing a classic Japanese high school uniform with a dark navy blazer, white shirt collar, large red ribbon bow at the neck, and a gray pleated skirt, with 2 visible gold blazer buttons. Both arms are stretched straight out horizontally to the sides toward the viewer, and both hands are making peace signs with the fingers angled downward. Use bold clean black outlines, soft pastel-like flat colors, minimal shading, kawaii sticker-style proportions, symmetrical composition, and a friendly playful expression.
